ocr_findings.description: Callout header 'コレが出る！' rendered as 'つしが出る！' — katakana コレ misread as hiragana/katakana mix つし. Appears twice on this page. Meaning lost for the callout label, though surrounding content is intact.
Page number '180' (visible in image bottom-left) not captured in OCR; instead spurious '111' appears mid-document. Minor structural artifact.

reviewer_notes: Content page on RPA vs Excel macros and IT-based business efficiency (テレワーク, シェアリングエコノミー). Main body text and the two-row table are accurately captured. The recurring callout header 'コレが出る！' is misread as 'つしが出る！' — a known OCR confusion with the stylized font, medium severity.
